text.title: LLM-Specific Error Categories
text.summary: Taxonomy of LLM agent failure modes used to classify MIS-NNN entries and select prevention strategies.

rule.statement: Tag entries with `hallucination-api` when the agent invents a non-existent library method or endpoint. Prevention: include API reference documentation in task context.
rule.rationale: LLMs pattern-match from similar APIs and generate syntactically plausible but non-existent calls with full confidence. Type checking and tests are the only reliable catches.

rule.statement: Tag entries with `hallucination-factual` when the agent confidently states a new feature, version, or behavior that does not exist. Prevention: ask for documentation links; treat any unverified "new in X" claim as unverified.
rule.rationale: The 64.5% blind-spot rate in self-correction studies means the agent cannot reliably flag its own factual errors. External verification is required.

rule.statement: Tag entries with `context-window-loss` when earlier instructions drift out of the effective context. Prevention: break tasks exceeding 300 lines into chunks; include a coding standards summary with each chunk.
rule.rationale: Models become unreliable at 65-80% of advertised context limits. Long conversations cause instruction drift even within the stated window.

rule.statement: Tag entries with `instruction-drift` when requirements specified at session start are not honored mid-task. Prevention: re-inject key constraints every N tool calls or task boundaries.
rule.rationale: Instruction drift is distinct from window loss — the instruction is technically in context but deprioritized by later content.

list.item: missing-error-handling: try/catch absent in async flows, silent failures in payment or critical paths
edge-cases-missed: boundary conditions, empty arrays, null fields not handled
scope-creep: unrequested features added during implementation
premature-optimization: performance changes before correctness verified
skipped-validation: quality gate bypassed, pre-commit hook skipped
estimation-underrun: task took 2x+ estimated tokens due to unknown unknowns
missing-env-var: new config variable not propagated to all environments
data-migration-no-backup: destructive operation without prior backup
